title: acer rubrum f. viride
intro: Acer rubrum f. viride, also known as the green red maple, is a variant of the red maple tree (Acer rubrum) that is native to eastern North America. The green red maple is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to help reduce inflammation and fever. The health benefits of Acer rubrum f. viride include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Acer rubrum f. viride is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be made into a syrup or salve to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
